errors.meaning: Paperclip watchdog timed out after 120s — likely the Paperclip API at 127.0.0.1:3100 was slow or unresponsive, causing the agent to exceed its timeout limit.
errors.suggestedFix: Check if Paperclip is running: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3100/health. If down, restart Paperclip. Consider increasing job timeoutSeconds to 180 or reducing API calls per run.

errors.meaning: The daily-brief job completed successfully and generated output, but the Slack delivery failed — likely a missing or malformed channel target in the delivery config.
errors.suggestedFix: Update the daily-brief job delivery config to use an explicit channel ID (e.g. channel:C0AMSE2TW2X) instead of relying on channel name resolution. The prior run showed 'Delivering to Slack requires target <channelId|user:ID|channel:ID>'.

errors.meaning: Previous daily-brief run also failed delivery — the delivery.to field was not set to a valid Slack channel ID format, so the message was never sent to #daily-brief.
errors.suggestedFix: Set delivery.to to 'channel:C0AMSE2TW2X' explicitly in the daily-brief cron job config to fix recurring delivery failures.
